blocking_issues: Free-form String inline phrases such as '问纳博特 {prompt}' fail real App Shortcuts metadata validation; v1 currently supports only the follow-up Siri phrase.

Simulator Siri can execute built-in commands such as 'Open Safari', but the supported custom Voice Bridge phrase still does not trigger AskBridgeIntent in UI tests; simulator Siri cannot replace real-device Siri acceptance.

A physical iPhone destination is now visible and paired, but Xcode on this Mac has no logged-in developer account, code-signing identity, or provisioning profiles, so real-device builds fail before install.
End-to-end Siri speech acceptance is blocked until Xcode can select a development team and automatic signing can create the required app identity/profile.
